description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: the Agent Token launch, an Atlas Edit Proposal submitted to Sky Governance will allow the respective founding teams of Spark and Grove to propose an initial cash grant to their respective Prime Foundation. Sky Governance must consent to this initial cash grant via approving the Sky Atlas modification.
